entities.description: The process of Bradyrhizobium forming nodules on the plant roots

entities.description: A nitrogen source supplied to plants in pot experiments

entities.description: A phosphorus source supplied to plants in pot experiments

entities.name: HAULM YIELDS
entities.description: The yield of the stems and leaves harvested from the groundnut plant
